name: io.github.AlexDuchDev/agenticmind
title: AgenticMind
description: Auditable, self-improving knowledge & memory layer for AI agents over MCP.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer typ="mcp" JWT (HS256, AUTH_SECRET). The endpoint is fail-closed and requires the knowledge:read scope. Mint one with `bun run scripts/issue-mcp-token.ts`.

token.description: MCP bearer token issued by the self-hosted AgenticMind instance.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your self-hosted AgenticMind server (headless Bun service).

tools.name: kl_search
tools.summary: Semantic / keyword passage search over the knowledge base.

tools.name: kl_ask_global
tools.summary: Synthesised, citation-enforced answer to a question (optional intent/facts).

tools.name: kl_get_material
tools.summary: Fetch metadata for a single material by its UUID.

tools.name: kl_graph_neighbors
tools.summary: Related materials via the knowledge graph (only when GraphRAG is enabled).

tools.name: kl_ingest
tools.summary: Add text to the corpus (chunked, embedded, distilled into fact cards, graph-extracted).

tools.name: kl_signal
tools.summary: Emit a programmatic compounding feedback signal on a prior answer.

tools.name: mem_recall
tools.summary: Recall beliefs (private ∪ shared); semantic filter or asOf time-travel.

tools.name: mem_write
tools.summary: Record a belief into private memory (bitemporal, revision-aware).
